summary: Tested responsive Layout.js across all 3 breakpoints: Desktop (1440px), Tablet (900px), Mobile (390px). All features verified successfully.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Layout.js fully responsive and tested. Desktop 1440px: sidebar 280px with logo, MÓDULOS label, 5 sections (Estoque/Agenda/CRM/Financeiro/Administração) with icons+labels+chevron, active state with green left bar, accordion expand/collapse animation, footer with user card (Guilherme Ferraz + ADMIN badge + email) + theme toggle + Sair button. Tablet 900px: 64px icon-only rail visible, bottom nav hidden. Mobile 390px: topbar with menu btn+logo+theme toggle, bottom nav with 5 items (Estoque/Agenda/Finanças/CRM/Config), sliding drawer opens on menu click with overlay, closes via X button. Navigation between pages works across all breakpoints.
